assertions.description: The agent opens the arXiv paper — either noting it auto-converts /abs/ URLs to PDF URLs or passing the URL to display_pdf
assertions.evidence: Agent attempts to fetch from the arXiv URL but encounters PDF format constraints and does not use display_pdf API. No mention of converting /abs/ to /pdf/ URLs or using the viewer tool.

assertions.description: The agent uses get_text to read methodology and/or results sections before proposing annotations
assertions.evidence: Agent describes what it would read (methodology, results) but never actually calls get_text. Only extracts high-level topic information from abstract page.

assertions.description: The agent batches annotations in manageable groups (not all at once) and shows the user each batch
assertions.evidence: No attempt to call add_annotations at all. Agent identifies batching as best practice but does not execute batched annotations.

assertions.description: get_screenshot is called after each batch of add_annotations to verify and present results
assertions.evidence: No calls to get_screenshot. No visual verification or presentation of results attempted.

assertions.description: The response mentions downloading the annotated PDF from the viewer toolbar
assertions.evidence: No mention of the viewer toolbar's download feature. Agent provides general recommendations about what tools would be needed but does not reference toolbar download.
